item.title: Data types in C: solved exercise with sizeof and casts
item.description: Solved C data types exercise using sizeof and explicit casts to prevent common mistakes.

item.title: Sequential programming in C: solved exercises from scratch
item.description: Solved sequential programming exercises in C using input, processing, and output for complete beginners.

item.title: If else in C: solved exercises with nested conditions
item.description: Solved if else exercises in C covering simple conditions, nested branches, and logical operators.

item.title: For loop in C: solved exercises with accumulators and counters
item.description: Solved for-loop exercises in C covering accumulators, counters, maximum value, and average calculation.

item.title: While and do while in C: solved exercises
item.description: Solved while and do while exercises in C with input validation, digit counting, and condition-driven loops.

item.title: Functions in C: solved exercises step by step
item.description: Solved exercises on functions in C: declaration, pass by value, pass by reference with pointers, and functions that return a value.

item.title: Switch case in C: solved exercise with interactive menu
item.description: Solved switch-case exercise in C with an interactive menu, multiple cases, default case, and comparison with if-else.

item.title: Enum and typedef in C: solved exercise with states
item.description: Solved enum and typedef exercise in C to model readable states and avoid magic numbers.

item.title: scanf and printf in C: solved input-output exercise
item.description: Solved scanf and printf exercise in C with simple input validation.

item.title: const in C: solved exercise with read-only parameters
item.description: Solved const exercise in C to protect data and avoid accidental mutations.

item.title: sizeof in C: solved exercise with types and arrays
item.description: Solved sizeof exercise in C to compute type sizes and array length.

item.title: Relational and logical operators in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved exercise on relational and logical operators in C with basic truth tables.

item.title: Ternary operator in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved ternary-operator exercise in C for short readable conditionals.

item.title: Explicit casting in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved explicit-casting exercise in C to control type conversions.

item.title: Break and continue in C: solved exercise with loops
item.description: Solved break and continue exercise in C: how to exit a loop early with break and how to skip iterations with continue.

item.title: Bitwise operators in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved bitwise operators exercise in C: AND, OR, XOR, NOT and shift operations with practical examples.

item.title: Define and macros in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved #define and macros exercise in C: symbolic constants, function-like macros, MAX, SQUARE and SWAP.

item.title: Static variables in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved static variables exercise in C: persistence between calls, difference from local variables, and use with functions.

item.title: Arrays as parameters in C: solved exercise
item.description: Solved arrays as function parameters exercise in C: why they are passed by implicit reference, use of const, and the size parameter.
